name: Asparagus and Pimento
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the asparagus and snap off any tough ends.
2. In a large skillet, bring water to a boil.
3. Add the asparagus to the boiling water and cover the pan.
4. Steam the asparagus until it is bright green, about 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Remove the skillet from the heat and drain the asparagus.
6. Arrange the drained asparagus on a serving platter.
7. Sprinkle with lime juice.
8. Garnish with diced pimento and toasted pine nuts.
9. Serve warm or chilled.
